fields.label: Warranty Plan ID
fields.description: Auto-generated sequential ID for mobile/API integration

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Company this warranty plan applies to.

fields.label: Plan Name
fields.description: e.g. 'Extended Warranty - 1 Year', 'Screen Protection Plan'

fields.label: Plan Type
fields.options:
Own Warranty
Extended Warranty
Value Added Service
Protection Plan
Post-Repair Warranty
fields.description: Own Warranty = free GoGizmo warranty on new purchase. Extended = paid extension. VAS = screen protector, data transfer, etc. Post-Repair = GoFix warranty issued after repair (depends on service/spare type).

fields.label: Coverage Scope
fields.options:
Full Device
Screen Only
Battery Only
Accessories Only
fields.description: What is specifically covered under this protection plan.

fields.label: Purchase Window (Hours)
fields.description: Hours after device sale within which this plan must be purchased. 0 = no restriction. Post-Repair plans always exempt.

fields.label: Service Item
fields.description: The ERPNext Item (is_stock_item=0) that represents this plan in transactions. Created as a non-stock service item.

fields.label: Brand
fields.description: Restrict this plan to a specific brand. Leave blank = all brands.

fields.label: Validity Period
fields.description: Leave blank for evergreen plans. Set dates for promotional / campaign-bound plans.

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: Plan is available for sale starting this date. Blank = always available.

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: Plan stops being available for sale after this date. Blank = no end date.

fields.label: Duration (Months)
fields.description: Duration of the warranty/plan in months. 0 = one-time service.

fields.label: Coverage Description
fields.description: What is covered under this plan

fields.label: Max Claims (Lifetime)
fields.description: Maximum claims allowed over the plan lifetime. 0 = unlimited.

fields.label: Claims Per Year
fields.description: Maximum claims per policy year (anniversary-based). 0 = no annual limit. Takes precedence over lifetime max if both are set.

fields.label: Deductible Amount
fields.description: Amount customer must pay per claim (excess).

fields.label: Standard Price
fields.description: Base selling price of this plan

fields.label: Pricing Mode
fields.description: Fixed = flat rate. Percentage = calculated as % of the device selling price.

fields.label: Percentage Value
fields.description: Percentage of device price when pricing_mode = Percentage

fields.label: Cost to Company
fields.description: What this plan costs GoFix (underwriting, third-party premium, etc.)

fields.label: Applicable Item Groups
fields.description: Item Groups this plan can be attached to. Leave blank = all.

fields.label: Applicable Categories
fields.description: CH Categories this plan applies to (e.g. Mobiles, Laptops). Leave blank = all categories.

fields.label: Attach Level
fields.description: Item = auto-added per qualifying item line. Bill = one per transaction. Optional = offered to customer.

fields.label: Applicable Channels
fields.description: Channels where this plan is available. Leave blank = all channels.

fields.label: Claim Behaviour
fields.description: Control how claims against this plan are classified, approved, and cost-split. Leave defaults for standard behaviour.

fields.label: Coverage Type Override
fields.description: Override automatic coverage classification. Blank = auto-detect based on duration vs Anniversary Threshold in VAS Settings.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Higher value = preferred when multiple active plans exist for a device. 0 = use default type-based priority.

fields.label: Requires Approval
fields.options:
Auto
Always
Never
If Company Pays
fields.description: Auto = system decides (anniversary=always, VAS=if company pays, paid=never). Always/Never = override. If Company Pays = require approval only when GoGizmo share > 0.

fields.label: Company Share %
fields.description: Percentage of covered amount (after deductible) that the warranty issuer company absorbs. 100 = full coverage, 50 = co-pay with customer.

fields.label: Post-Repair Warranty (Months)
fields.description: Override global post-repair warranty duration for claims under this plan. 0 = use VAS Settings default.

fields.label: Fee Rules
fields.description: Configure fees charged to the customer for claims under this plan. Multiple fees can be combined (e.g. processing fee + visiting charge). Leave empty = use default fee logic from VAS Settings.

fields.label: Coverage Rules
fields.description: Per-issue-type coverage matrix. Leave empty = all issues covered equally at plan-level settings.
